method_description: VLM gives drawing+caption sub-bboxes per part on parts page; SAM3 refines an object mask within each VLM cell via local-crop box-prompt.

vlm.role: coarse drawing_bbox + caption_bbox per part (absolute px)
vlm.bbox_format: absolute pixels in input image (Qwen2.5-VL native)

sam3.role: object mask refinement inside VLM drawing_bbox via crop-then-box-prompt
